# Dan Guenet

> Dan Guenet is a GTM systems builder who combines go-to-market operations and technical expertise to help revenue teams align around the right goals and execute effectively.

## Background

Dan worked in go-to-market operations at several startups before moving into consulting through [Performance RevOps](https://performancerevops.com/). Alongside his consulting work, he built [DealBlockers](https://dealblockers.com/), a SaaS application.

More recently, Dan has focused on GTM engineering, bringing his GTM operations experience and technical skills together to design and build practical revenue systems.

## Areas of expertise

- Helping GTM teams and leadership align on goals, strategy, and measurable outcomes
- Building total addressable market (TAM) models and account lists with Clay
- Identifying and operationalizing buying signals
- Designing account-based marketing (ABM) orchestration that coordinates marketing and sales around the same accounts at the same time
- Building workflows, automation, data infrastructure, and reporting that support execution
- Creating tight feedback loops so teams can learn and improve continuously
- Connecting strategy, people, data, tools, and processes across the revenue organization

## Projects and businesses

- [Performance RevOps](https://performancerevops.com/): Dan's GTM and revenue operations consulting practice
- [DealBlockers](https://dealblockers.com/): a SaaS application built by Dan
